nasb.text: Then he said to Gehazi his servant, “Call this Shunammite.” And when he had called her, she stood before him.

esv.text: And he said to Gehazi his servant, “Call this Shunammite.” When he had called her, she stood before him.

cnv.text: 他對他的僕人基哈西說：“你去叫這書念的婦人來。”於是他叫了她來，站在他的面前。

ccb.text: 以利沙吩咐仆人基哈西去请书念的妇人。她来了，站在以利沙面前。
